what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter attachment record that links a design-source channel entry to an image asset identified by a URI.
observations: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter only
No body content or code symbols
standouts: References an image asset via the image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-40 URI
Attachment type is images for the design-source channel
Timestamped provenance record with no author field
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Id prefix att- for attachment records
References external media via a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: Target URI provides no checksum, dimensions, or format metadata
No alt text or caption describing the image content
notes: A timestamped image attachment record pointing to a pitch-scoped asset in the design-source channel.
questions: What visual content does image p-40 contain?
Which pitch or entry in the design-source channel does this attachment belong to?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the referenced image:// asset resolvable and versioned?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file records an image attachment for a channel memory entry.
intention_signals: Catalog an image asset associated with a recent pitch in the design-source channel so it can be retrieved alongside related memory entries.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme scoped to a channel and pitch path rather than a plain file path.
contribution: A structured attachment record that maps a channel memory entry to a specific image asset and captures the attachment time.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-2a7e4818 in the design-source channel referencing image asset image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-40, added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: Track an image attachment tied to a recent pitch in the design-source channel with a timestamped reference.
